lang7: We sincerely invite you to join our ranks and restart the elite force that has been dormant for 14 years. We look forward to your participation in shouldering the responsibility of protecting world security. Let us work together to create brilliance and embark on a new journey!
lang21: Click here if I am over 18 years old
lang22: Please cllick on the Privacy Policy
lang23: Please click on to confirm your age
lang43: We just passed your permission to act, good luck
